URL: https://github.com/ROCm/rocm-systems
Language: c++
super repo for rocm systems projects

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/MNN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/MNN
Language: c++
MNN is a blazing fast, lightweight deep learning framework, battle-tested by business-critical use cases in Alibaba. Full multimodal LLM Android App:[MNN-LLM-Android](./apps/Android/MnnLlmChat/README.md). MNN TaoAvatar Android - Local 3D Avatar Intelligence: apps/Android/Mnn3dAvatar/README.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cocos/cocos-engine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cocos/cocos-engine
Language: c++
Cocos simplifies game creation and distribution with Cocos Creator, a free, open-source, cross-platform game engine. Empowering millions of developers to create high-performance, engaging 2D/3D games and instant web entertainment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duckdb/duckdb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb
Language: c++
DuckDB is an analytical in-process SQL database management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esphome/esphome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esphome/esphome
Language: c++
ESPHome is a system to control your ESP8266/ESP32 by simple yet powerful configuration files and control them remotely through Home Automation systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/rocksdb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/rocksdb
Language: c++
A library that provides an embeddable, persistent key-value store for fast storage.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss
Language: c++
A library for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.
